queries.question: Give me descriptions of preservation methods each film archivist uses.
queries.sql: SELECT Preservation_Methods.description  from Archived_Films join Preservation_Methods on Archived_Films.preservation_method_id = Preservation_Methods.id join Film_Archivists on Archived_Films.archiver_id = Film_Archivists.id   GROUP BY Archived_Films.preservation_method_id HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT Archived_Films.archiver_id) = (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM  Film_Archivists)

queries.question: Give me descriptions of preservation methods each film archivist uses.
queries.sql: select film_archivists.name , preservation_methods.description from Archived_Films join Preservation_Methods on Archived_Films.preservation_method_id = Preservation_Methods.id join Film_Archivists on Archived_Films.archiver_id = Film_Archivists.id
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/filmmaking#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/filmmaking/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?name ?description WHERE {
  ?archived_films a :Archived_Films .
  ?preservation_methods a :Preservation_Methods .
  ?archived_films p:hasPreservation_Methods ?preservation_methods .
  ?film_archivists a :Film_Archivists .
  ?archived_films p:hasFilm_Archivists ?film_archivists .
  ?film_archivists p:name ?name .
  ?preservation_methods p:description ?description .
}

queries.question: What methods are popular among all archivists?
queries.sql: SELECT Preservation_Methods.method  from Archived_Films join Preservation_Methods on Archived_Films.preservation_method_id = Preservation_Methods.id join Film_Archivists on Archived_Films.archiver_id = Film_Archivists.id   GROUP BY Archived_Films.preservation_method_id HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT Archived_Films.archiver_id) = (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM  Film_Archivists)

queries.question: For every film archivist, list the preservation methods used and their descriptions.
queries.sql: select film_archivists.name , preservation_methods.method , preservation_methods.description from Archived_Films join Preservation_Methods on Archived_Films.preservation_method_id = Preservation_Methods.id join Film_Archivists on Archived_Films.archiver_id = Film_Archivists.id
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/filmmaking#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/filmmaking/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?name ?method ?description WHERE {
  ?archived_films a :Archived_Films .
  ?preservation_methods a :Preservation_Methods .
  ?archived_films p:hasPreservation_Methods ?preservation_methods .
  ?film_archivists a :Film_Archivists .
  ?archived_films p:hasFilm_Archivists ?film_archivists .
  ?film_archivists p:name ?name .
  ?preservation_methods p:method ?method .
  ?preservation_methods p:description ?description .
}

queries.question: Tell me the preservation methods and their descriptions each film archivist uses.
queries.sql: SELECT Preservation_Methods.method, Preservation_Methods.description  from Archived_Films join Preservation_Methods on Archived_Films.preservation_method_id = Preservation_Methods.id join Film_Archivists on Archived_Films.archiver_id = Film_Archivists.id   GROUP BY Archived_Films.preservation_method_id HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT Archived_Films.archiver_id) = (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM  Film_Archivists)

queries.question: For each archivist, list the methods they use.
queries.sql: select film_archivists.name , preservation_methods.method from Archived_Films join Preservation_Methods on Archived_Films.preservation_method_id = Preservation_Methods.id join Film_Archivists on Archived_Films.archiver_id = Film_Archivists.id
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/filmmaking#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/filmmaking/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?name ?method WHERE {
  ?archived_films a :Archived_Films .
  ?preservation_methods a :Preservation_Methods .
  ?archived_films p:hasPreservation_Methods ?preservation_methods .
  ?film_archivists a :Film_Archivists .
  ?archived_films p:hasFilm_Archivists ?film_archivists .
  ?film_archivists p:name ?name .
  ?preservation_methods p:method ?method .
}

ambiguous_dsl.question: Tell me the methods every archivist uses.
Tell me the preservation methods and their descriptions each film archivist uses.
Give me descriptions of preservation methods each film archivist uses.
